name: Fallaway Reverse Slip Pivot
preceding_figure_names: Basic Weave, Bounce Fallaway with Weave Ending, Closed Impetus and Feather Finish, Fallaway Reverse and Slip Pivot, Feather Step, Hover Cross, Hover Feather, Natural Hover Telemark, Natural Telemark, Natural Twist Turn, Natural Weave, Natural Zig-Zag from PP, Open Telemark and Feather Ending, Open Telemark, Natural Turn, Outside Swivel and Feather Ending, Reverse Turn, Top Spin, Weave from PP
following_figure_names: Change Of Direction, Hover Telemark, Reverse Wave, Fallaway Reverse and Slip Pivot, Basic Weave (At corner), Open Telemark and Feather Ending (At corner)
notes:
Different timings that can be used on this figure: SQQS, SQQ&, SQ&Q, S&QQ, QQQQ. (S: 2 beats, Q: 1 beat, &: 1/2 beat)
When this figure is danced into corner, start DW or LOD to follow with a Reverse figure, DC of new LOD.
Depending on the previous alignment and choreography, e.g. if starting DW into corner, the 2nd step could be taken diagonal (instead of moving along LOD)

steps.action: RF back in Fallaway R side leading
comments: Do not lower R heel, otherwise the weight is likely to move too far back.

steps.action: LF back in CBMP and Fallaway
RF back, LF held in CBMP
LF back in Fallaway, L side leading
comments: This is a back step, not a side step, going in same diagonal direction BDC.
This step needs to be bigger (to stay behind Man, don't get in front of him). L hip stays open to clear way for Man.
Hips and body are both turning to L continuously.

steps.action: RF back in CBMP and Fallaway (small step), LF held in CBMP
LF fwd in CBMP, RF held in CBMP
steps.alignment: To center, end backing LOD or DW
comments: Pivot on LF, keep shape, stay very left.
After pivoting, don't stop, keep the extension and continue with rotation, use L leg to push and continue turning into next step.
